strings.RSMM_TheForgotten_Vindicator_ability1_de: A righteous melee strike that deals bonus damage to cursed enemies.
strings.RSMM_TheForgotten_Vindicator_ability2_de: Raise a protective barrier that blocks incoming damage.
strings.RSMM_TheForgotten_Vindicator_ability3_de: Heal yourself and nearby allies over time.
strings.RSMM_TheForgotten_Vindicator_ability4_de: Ultimate: Call down a devastating beam of holy light.
